headline: Samantha Wildow: Shearer’s potato chip production factory opens in Moraine following $110M investment
summary: * Save Ribbon cutting for Shearer’s Foods in Moraine About 60 million pounds of chips, treats, and other snacks will be coming out of the new Shearer’s Foods production facility filling the former General Motors vehicle painting facility off Stroop Road in Moraine, according to the company. Shearer’s leaders, the Dayton business community, the city of Moraine, and lawmakers celebrated the ...
